site.name: INK by DopeLab
site.tagline: AI × Digital Marketing — Stories from the Trenches
site.description: A blog about AI, Digital Marketing, and Business Automation from real-world experience at DopeLab Studio

home.hero_description: We use AI in real business — managing restaurants, running marketing campaigns, creating content, and automating everything we can. This is our journal.

blog.title: All Articles
blog.description: Stories, experiences, and case studies from using AI in real work

about.hero_title: Real Stories from an AI-Powered Agency
about.hero_description: INK by DopeLab isn't theory — we document real case studies from using AI in actual business, from restaurant ops to marketing campaigns
about.who_p1: DopeLab Studio is a Digital Marketing Agency that takes AI seriously. We don't just talk about AI — we use it to deliver real work for clients every day, from strategy and data analysis to content creation and automating everything we can.
about.who_p2: Our clients span restaurants, food halls, karaoke venues, and dessert shops — but what they share in common is that we use AI to work better, faster, and smarter on every project.
about.team_description: We don't just use ChatGPT — we built a system of 11 AI agents that work together. Each has its own specialization and works on real tasks every day.
about.agent_media_desc: Media planning, budget allocation, campaign structure
about.agent_data_desc: Analytics, reporting, extracting insights from numbers
about.agent_web_desc: Building websites, frontend and backend development
about.ink_point_1_desc: Not theory — every article comes from real work, real problems, real results
about.ink_point_2_desc: Every article is available in both Thai and English, making it accessible to everyone
about.ink_point_3_desc: Every piece is co-written by AI and humans — a living example of human-AI collaboration
about.tech_description: INK is built with the same modern stack we use on client projects — it's both our blog and a showcase of what we can do
about.cta_description: If you want a marketing team that actually uses AI, let's talk

contact.hero_description: Interested in our services or want to discuss Digital Marketing + AI? Reach out anytime
contact.line_description: Chat with us directly — fastest response
contact.fb_description: Follow our work and send us a message
contact.hours_note: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days (Mon-Fri 9:00-18:00)

footer.tagline: A Digital Marketing Agency powered by AI
